## Autonomous Robot Protocol Standard Bot

This workspace contains a protocol-based autonomous robot control system with advanced movement capabilities including ground navigation, lift, and flight modes.

### Project Overview
- **Type**: Robotics Control System
- **Language**: Python
- **Key Features**:
  - Signal processing for future course planning
  - Autonomous forward movement
  - Vertical lift capability
  - Flight mode with continuous autonomy
  - Protocol-based communication standard

### Development Guidelines
- Use object-oriented design for robot components
- Implement state machines for movement modes
- Ensure thread-safe signal processing
- Maintain continuous autonomous operation during mode transitions
- Follow robotics safety protocols

### Progress Tracking
- [x] Verify copilot-instructions.md file created
- [x] Clarify project requirements (autonomous bot with flight)
- [x] Scaffold the project structure
- [x] Customize robotics protocol code
- [x] Install required extensions
- [x] Compile and test project
- [x] Create tasks.json if needed
- [x] Finalize documentation

### How to Run
```bash
# Run directly
python3 main.py

# Or use VS Code task: Terminal > Run Task > "Run Autonomous Robot"
```

Press Ctrl+C to gracefully stop the robot.
